concept: Cosmic caravan paddock where pop relics become one dreamlike home
scene: A gouache painting of a twilight paddock opening into a fantastical caravan interior, where the wall of the caravan has been cut away like a stage set and the farm beyond melts seamlessly into a starry evening sky. In the foreground, a large white goat stands in warm lamplight on a black-and-cream checkerboard threshold, while a few brown goats wander between tufts of grass and the caravan steps. Inside, a red upholstered chair sits beside a glowing fireplace; above it hangs a chandelier and a salon wall covered with a rough grid of monochrome pinned photographs painted as loose black-and-white rectangles, echoing a bohemian memory wall. A green lizard drapes over a red rotary telephone near a pineapple, and a tree with autumn leaves curves through the room and out through the roof into the night. Through the open side of the caravan, an adult celestial muse in flowing blue, green, and crimson robes rides a golden star low over the scene, becoming the clear focal figure as she passes above the goats and roofline. Behind her, planets and a ringed orb drift in deep ultramarine. One interior curtain and a patch of wallpaper dissolve into narrow vertical painted bands, as if the room itself is split into staggered strips around a pale silver-haired adult face motif hidden in the décor. Geometric striped arches and semicircles are worked into the caravan wallpaper, rug borders, and window trim in teal, mustard, orange, and red, while a single crisp black horizontal bar appears as a minimalist shelf edge against a broad white wall section. Along the dark lower edge and roof trim, angular ember-red zigzag motifs are painted like decorative signage, glowing against textured black panels. The whole image is unified by matte gouache surfaces, visible brushwork, warm fire-and-lantern light against cool blue shadows, and the feeling of a traveling dream-home parked at the edge of the cosmos.
prompt: Create one gouache painting - matte opaque paint, confident visible brushstrokes, soft blends and chalky texture, like a mid-century book illustration. The image is a 16:9 music blog header. Weave in recognisable elements taken from the 8 uploaded album covers: source 1: adult woman riding a golden star through a planet-filled night sky; source 2: vertically sliced red-clad silver-haired adult portrait motif; source 3: surreal caravan interior with fireplace, chandelier, tree, lizard, and red chair; source 4: wall of grainy black-and-white pinned photo collage; source 5: striped semicircle geometric pattern in teal, mustard, orange, and red; source 6: large white goat in the foreground with other goats around it; source 7: broad white negative space punctuated by a single black horizontal line; source 8: angular red-orange zigzag emblem translated into decorative trim. Transform the subjects, figures, creatures, objects, and symbols depicted in the uploaded covers so they stay recognisable, and place them all inside one cohesive world with a single shared setting and consistent light. Paint each album motif into the scene as a naturally belonging painted element - loose and gestural but unmistakable. Composition: A classic painterly composition - a landscape, interior, or figure study with a clear focal hierarchy. Colour direction: ultramarine blue, mustard gold, ember red, teal blue, warm cream - mixed painterly colour drawn from the sleeves, warm lights against cool shadows. Mood: nostalgic, surreal, warmly theatrical. Keep the scene safe and tasteful: feature only adults (no children, infants, or minors), and show no gore, wounds, body horror, medical or anatomical imagery, blank or milky eyes, nudity, or sexual content. Reinterpret any such source motif abstractly, and suggest rather than exactly replicate the likeness of any identifiable real person. Do not include any text, letters, words, numbers, captions, titles, logos, watermarks, or signage anywhere in the image. Avoid: readable text, letters, words, numbers, captions, titles, logos, watermarks, signage, grid layout, contact sheet, evenly tiled squares, raw album-cover thumbnails, collage of separate panels, photorealistic photograph, DSLR photo, 3D render, CGI, octane render, glossy 3D rendering, camera depth of field, lens bokeh, realistic skin texture, a posed group of people arranged for the camera, objects displayed on tables, trays, or plinths, one giant central sculpture as the centrepiece of the scene. Bold, confident, gallery-quality print design with a strong sense of place.
